ddt:Target.Name: BAT62 v1.5
ddt:Target.Description:
BAT62 for X62ph2 cluster ====================
A. FUSEE Assystem antoine.fusee-renexter@renault.com
******************** HISTORY ********************
V01 : ==== Creation based on BIC ECU DDT base.
V01.1 : ====== Update of DTC table
V01.2 : ====== Update of DTC table Replace DTC's $C02888 and $C02788 with $934D96 and $934C96 Services $21 $82 and $21 $85 not requested on BAT62
V01.2 : ====== Update of Auto-identification for SW6

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range/zero adjust.failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Battery level
Data.Comment: Battery level

Data.Name: CAN_M topo
Data.Comment: CAN-M topo

Data.Name: LID_ VIN_ CRC
Data.Comment: key code confirming the validity of the VIN, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: LID_ VIN_ V I N
Data.Comment: Serial number of the car, written at Renault factory

Data.Name: RDBLID traceability serial number
Data.Comment: production umber in the week

Data.Name: RDBLID traceability week
Data.Comment: week number in the year

Data.Name: RDBLID traceability year of production
Data.Comment: Year of production

Data.Name: RMBA MemoryAddress
Data.Comment: memory address to be dumped

Data.Name: RMBA MemorySize
Data.Comment: memory size to be dumped

Data.Name: SDS_type of diagnostic session_R
Data.Comment: type of diagnostic session to be activated

Data.Name: ECUR_reset type_R
Data.Comment: Type of reset asked by the tool

Data.Name: ODO_TOTAL
Data.Comment: Total odometer recorded in the part

Data.Name: ODO_RESET_CPT
Data.Comment: Counter for general odometer reset actions

Data.Name: CFG_AutomaticLockUpActivationState
Data.Comment: Initial value for automatic lock up activation state

Data.Name: CFG_DistanceUnit
Data.Comment: Defines the distance unit used on the vehicle

Data.Name: CFG_DiveSide
Data.Comment: Defines if vehicle is LHD or RHD

Data.Name: CFG_SpeedAdvanceLaw
Data.Comment: Defines if speed advance law is applied or not

Data.Name: DisplayRequestTimeout_CF
Data.Comment: Defines the display request timout

Data.Name: DiagnosticIdentificationCode
Data.Comment: Diag evolution number

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Numero de calibration en Hexa

Data.Name: SoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software identification number

Data.Name: SupplierNumber.ITG
Data.Comment: Supplier ITG code

Data.Name: EditionNumber
Data.Comment: Software version(edition) number

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS
